Make Your Own Ejection GIF or Video: Make Your Own Ejection GIF or Video
Type a name, pick or upload a crewmate,: Type a name, pick or upload a crewmate, and watch them get voted off in the classic Among Us ejection animation — cape, spin, and all. The ejection text can say anything you want. Swap the stock crewmate color for your own image or GIF if you'd rather eject a face, a logo, or a friend.
Pick a crewmate color or upload your own: Pick a crewmate color or upload your own image. Edit the ejection text and the impostor-remain line. Preview the animation, then download.
The GIF download is free forever, with a: The GIF download is free forever, with a small watermark. Want it clean for a stream, a Discord clip, or a short? A 720p MP4 with watermark is $3, and a watermark-free 1080p MP4 is $5. No account needed — pay once, download for 24 hours.
